match.userMessage:
cinematic still of SCARLETT in casual beach attire walking forward along the Bondi promenade holding the coral lipstick tube from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) loosely in her hand, ocean waves rolling behind on the shoreline with damp sand underfoot and the coastal path stretching into the distance, breezy late-afternoon atmosphere with warm natural sunlight casting gentle highlights across the scene and creating depth in the rolling water, shallow depth of field, handheld energy with natural micro-movement, modern social-first product photography style, bright airy quality, true-to-life colors with crisp whites and lifted shadows, slight warmth in highlights

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI PROMENADE - DAY - Bondi promenade with ocean rolling
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - A slim glossy coral lipstick tube with metallic body and extended vibrant bullet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
